column5: Brown, gravelly silty medium to coarse SAND. (FILL)

Moderately strong to strong, pinkish grey spotted black and white, moderately to slightly decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely spaced and occasionally medium to closely spaced, very narrow to extremely narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese stained and kaolin coated joints, dipping 10-20, 40-50, 65-75.
